channel.title: CyberPulse
channel.description: Executive cyber intelligence briefings on cyber risk, AI threats, infrastructure exposure, and board-level decision-making.

item.title: CyberPulse — Pressure Ledger
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: CyberPulse Daily Brief for Gulf-region security leaders on data-extortion pressure, ransomware consolidation, developer-secret theft, embedded-device exposure, and active exploitation.
